_comment: MCP server manifest. Points at the lakebase-mcp-server bin shipped by this package. Consumers (Claude Desktop, OpenAI Codex, Cursor when using MCP) read this to spawn the stdio server. Source: apps/mcp-server/.
_targets: Cursor (when using MCP rather than skill plugin)
_install: 1. From a clone: `npm install && npm run build` (npm `prepare` builds dist/).
2. Add this server to your client's MCP config — for Claude Desktop, copy the entry below into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json under `mcpServers`.
3. Replace `node ./dist/apps/mcp-server/index.js` with an absolute path if the client doesn't have a cwd inside the repo.
